posts.text:
BREAKING: Iran’s President Pezeshkian says President Trump has “no justification to deprive Iran of its nuclear rights.”

Just 48 hours ago, President Trump said Iran agreed to give up uranium enrichment and all “nuclear dust.”
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
